**As a** Customer  
**I need** Filters
**So that** I can find products easily
      
### Details and Assumptions
The customer should be able to filter products so they can easily find what they wants.
Customer is in the Homepage, the filter icon appears clearly in the page, customer can click it to filter products
### Acceptance Criteria     
Given that I am on the Homepage
When I click the filter option
Then I should be able to filter products
